panels.title: All Instances — Production PnL (Strategy ${strategy_id_derived})
panels.description: All live instances sharing the same strategy ID as the selected instance. Each line = one strategy_table_name, colored by instance. Use this to compare configs/versions running the same strategy.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS cumulative_pnl FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_prod_v2 WHERE (empty('${strategy_id_derived}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id_derived}) AND (empty('${underlying_derived}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying_derived}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS cumulative_pnl FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 WHERE (empty('${strategy_id_derived}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id_derived}) AND (empty('${underlying_derived}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying_derived}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

panels.title: All Instances — Backtest PnL (Strategy ${strategy_id_derived})
panels.description: All backtest instances sharing the same strategy ID as the selected instance. Each line = one strategy_table_name. Use this to compare how different configs performed historically.

targets.rawSql: WITH raw AS (SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS pnl FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_bt_v2 WHERE (empty('${strategy_id_derived}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id_derived}) AND (empty('${underlying_derived}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying_derived}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name) SELECT time, strategy_table_name, pnl - first_value(pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY time) AS cumulative_pnl FROM raw ORDER BY time

panels.title: Cumulative PnL (from backtest day 0) - Backtest vs Real-time
panels.description: Cumulative PnL computed as sum(pnl) over all bars — immune to upstream writer drift/resets. Production is offset to continue from the backtest curve end.

targets.rawSql: WITH bt_at_start AS (SELECT JSONExtractFloat(argMin(row_json, revision_ts), 'cumulative_pnl') AS v FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts = (SELECT min(ts) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}')), dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}'), running AS (SELECT ts AS time, sum(JSONExtractFloat(row_json, 'pnl')) OVER (ORDER BY ts) + ifNull((SELECT v FROM bt_at_start), 0) AS cumulative_pnl FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1) SELECT time, cumulative_pnl AS `Production PnL (sum_pnl)` FROM running WHERE time >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND time <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) ORDER BY time

WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'cumulative_pnl') AS `Backtest PnL`, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'benchmark') AS `Benchmark` FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1 ORDER BY d.ts ASC

WITH bt_at_start AS (SELECT JSONExtractFloat(argMin(row_json, revision_ts), 'cumulative_pnl') AS v FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts = (SELECT min(ts) FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}')), rt_at_start AS (SELECT argMin(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS v FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}') SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) - (SELECT v FROM rt_at_start) + ifNull((SELECT v FROM bt_at_start), 0) AS `Real Trade PnL (sum_pnl)` FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Cumulative PnL (from 0%) - Backtest vs Real-time
panels.description: Cumulative PnL computed as sum(pnl) over all bars — all series rebased to 0 at the start of the selected time window. Use this to compare strategy vs buy-and-hold across any range.

targets.rawSql: WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}'), running AS (SELECT ts AS time, sum(JSONExtractFloat(row_json, 'pnl')) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS cumulative_pnl FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1), windowed AS (SELECT time, cumulative_pnl FROM running WHERE time >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND time <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT time, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS `Production PnL (sum_pnl)` FROM windowed ORDER BY time

WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))), base AS (SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'cumulative_pnl') AS cumulative_pnl, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'benchmark') AS benchmark FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1) SELECT time, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS `Backtest PnL`, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS `Benchmark` FROM base ORDER BY time

WITH rt_at_start AS (SELECT argMin(cumulative_pnl, ts) AS v FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, argMax(cumulative_pnl, ts) - (SELECT v FROM rt_at_start) AS `Real Trade PnL (sum_pnl)` FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Drawdown
panels.description: How far the strategy has fallen from its peak. Shows both production and backtest drawdowns, plus the benchmark (buy-and-hold) drawdown for comparison.

targets.rawSql: WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))), base AS (SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'cumulative_pnl') AS cumulative_pnl, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'benchmark') AS benchmark FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1) SELECT time, cumulative_pnl - max(cumulative_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production Drawdown`, benchmark - max(benchmark) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark Drawdown` FROM base ORDER BY time

WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))), base AS (SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'cumulative_pnl') AS cumulative_pnl FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1) SELECT time, cumulative_pnl - max(cumulative_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest Drawdown` FROM base ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE (empty('${strategy_id_derived}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id_derived}) AND (empty('${underlying_derived}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying_derived}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Position — Backtest vs Production
panels.description: Position size held by this strategy. Shows both backtest and production positions. If showing 0, verify the strategy outputs a 'position' field in its row_json.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, argMax(position, ts) AS `Production Position` FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_prod_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, argMax(position, ts) AS `Backtest Position` FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, argMax(position, ts) AS `Real Trade Position` FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Position tX (Backtest) vs Position (Production)
panels.description: Compares backtest position_tX (delayed target position) with production position. Both from raw history tables with earliest-revision dedup.

targets.rawSql: WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'position') AS `Production Position` FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1 ORDER BY d.ts ASC

WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_bt_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'position_tX') AS `Backtest Position tX` FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1 ORDER BY d.ts ASC

WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'price') AS `Price` FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1 ORDER BY d.ts ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, argMax(price, ts) AS `Real Trade Price` FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_${resolution}_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Final Signal
panels.description: Composite model signal that drives position sizing. If showing 0, verify the strategy outputs a 'final_signal' field in its row_json.

targets.rawSql: WITH dedup AS (SELECT ts, row_json, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ts ORDER BY revision_ts ASC) AS rn FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) SELECT d.ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(d.row_json, 'final_signal') AS `Final Signal` FROM dedup d WHERE d.rn = 1 ORDER BY d.ts ASC

panels.title: Feature Explorer — ${feature}
panels.description: Pick any numeric field from the strategy's raw output. Fields ending in _signal are model outputs; others are input features. Note: data is at bar-level resolution (not 1-min interpolated).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, JSONExtractFloat(row_json, '${feature}') AS feature_value FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND '${feature}' != '' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) ORDER BY time

list.name: strategy_instance
list.label: Strategy Instance
list.definition: SELECT strategy_table_name FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 GROUP BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY min(strategy_no)
list.query: SELECT strategy_table_name FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 GROUP BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY min(strategy_no)

list.name: strategy_id_derived
list.label: Strategy ID (derived)
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT toString(strategy_id) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}'
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT toString(strategy_id) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}'

list.name: underlying_derived
list.label: Underlying (derived)
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT underlying FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}'
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT underlying FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}'

list.name: feature
list.label: Feature / Signal
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(JSONExtractKeys(row_json)) AS k FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY k
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(JSONExtractKeys(row_json)) AS k FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 WHERE strategy_table_name = '${strategy_instance}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY k

list.name: resolution
list.label: Resolution
list.description: Auto-selected resolution based on time range: 1min (< 7d), 1hour (7-90d), 1day (> 90d).
